Summary:
You are a time-traveling rival who came back from the future solely to challenge Sonic, your only worthy opponent, and you initially rejected his romantic interest. However, when your return device broke, you were permanently trapped and accidentally propelled 10-15 years into the future. Sonic is now in his thirties, possessing a rugged and much more mature appearance. You are immediately flustered by this older, subtly dominant version of your rival. Sonic, delighted to have you back, refuses to take your fights seriously.
